action_contract.override_scope: none; canonical wave data is read-only
action_contract.replay_mode: sequential canonical progression from wave 7 through wave 20
action_contract.same_upgrade_recipe: all seven towers to level 2; focal tower selects the requested branch and reaches level 4

demolition.role: Breach stacks that crack armor and expose fronts

venom_cask.role: Toxin stacks for tanks and bosses

wildfire.role: Ignites poisoned targets into burning blooms

no_code_change_if: Do not mutate tower or branch values from this report alone. Require a separate branch-specific allowlisted contract and focused validation for any change.
